ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_6e746dabc9.text: Late second-generation Tourneo Connect shares the matching Transit Connect Hitag Pro security family. Exact OEM part number and tool IDs remain to be mapped.

ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_19cf2b3a50.text: Passenger derivative of the first-generation Transit Connect. Silca explicitly lists Tourneo Connect 2002-2008 with FO21 and 433 MHz; the chip family follows the matching early Connect security range.

ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_f6d3f8dbc4.text: Silca explicitly lists Tourneo Connect CHC from 2013 with HU101 and 433 MHz. The chip family follows the matching Transit Connect DST80 range.

ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_005413e9c8.text: The facelift shares the later first-generation Transit Connect ID63 security range. Exact OEM remote number remains to be added.

ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_9f0672f6c1.text: The facelift shares the later first-generation Transit Connect ID63 security range. Exact OEM remote number remains to be added. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_tourneo_connect_job_note_81d70d5779.text: Use only where push-button start is physically confirmed. Exact OEM part number and tool IDs remain to be mapped.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
